levelList.name: Wildstroke
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] If target does not have [BearClawWound], Clash Power +1
[WhenUse] If target has 6+ ([Laceration] + [Sinking]), Coin Power +1

levelList.name: Dessin Rapide
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] If target does not have [BearClawWound], Clash Power +1
[WhenUse] If target has 6+ ([Laceration] + [Sinking]), Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] If target has 5+ Mauled Color, convert all Coins on this Skill to [SuperCoin]s
[DefeatDuel]
- Damage from this Skill does not Stagger the target
- On Hit, does not trigger [Sinking] effects on the target

levelList.name: Le Fauvisme - Paint and Unfurl
levelList.desc:
Deal +10% damage for every 3 Mauled Color on target (max 30%)
[WhenUse] If target has 6+ ([Laceration] + [Sinking]), Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] At less than 50% HP, or if target has 5+ Mauled Color, use Coin 3 an additional time and convert all Coins on this Skill to [SuperCoin]s
[DefeatDuel]
- Damage from this Skill does not Stagger the target
- On Hit, does not trigger [Sinking] effects on the target

levelList.name: Target Sighted
levelList.desc:
If target has [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality], Clash Power +1 and deal +10% damage
Final Power +1 for every 6 ([Breath] on self + [Sinking] on target) (max 2)
[WhenUse] At 6+ [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], or if target has [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality], convert the final Coin of this Skill into [SuperCoin]
[WhenUse] Gain 2 [Breath] and +2 [Breath] Count
[DefeatDuel]
- Damage from this Skill does not Stagger the target
- On Hit, does not trigger [Sinking] effects on the target

levelList.name: To Where the Prescript Points
levelList.desc:
If target has [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality], Clash Power +1 and deal +20% damage
Final Power +1 for every 6 ([Breath] on self + [Sinking] on target) (max 3)
[WhenUse] At 6+ [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], or if target has [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality], convert the final Coin of this Skill into [SuperCoin]
[WhenUse] Gain 3 [Breath] and +3 [Breath] Count
[DefeatDuel]
- Damage from this Skill does not Stagger the target
- On Hit, does not trigger [Sinking] effects on the target

levelList.name: Undertake Prescript
levelList.desc:
If target has [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality], Clash Power +2 and deal +25% damage
Final Power +1 for every 6 ([Breath] on self + [Sinking] on target) (max 3)
[WhenUse] At 3+ [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] At 6+ [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], or if target has [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality], convert all Coins of this Skill into [SuperCoin]
[WhenUse] Gain 4 [Breath] and +3 [Breath] Count
[DefeatDuel]
- Damage from this Skill does not Stagger the target
- On Hit, does not trigger [Sinking] effects on the target

coindescs.desc: Deal +5% damage for every [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] on self (max 45%)
